raw.advertiser_name: Promise Pets by Build-A-Bear: A Virtual Pet Game
raw.message: Celebrate the 75th anniversary year of one of the world's most beloved comic strips with our NEW Peanuts® collection! Flap Snoopy’s ears when you press his paw and give any furry friend a dapper look with our commemorative Peanuts® suit.

hook.summary: Snoopy plush in a tuxedo celebrates 75 years of Peanuts.
hook.visual_action: A Snoopy plush toy wearing a grey patterned tuxedo and red bowtie stands against a bright yellow background with a zig-zag border.

scene_flow: Static product shot of the Snoopy 75th anniversary plush in a tuxedo.
Display of the Peanuts 75th anniversary logo and 'the stuff you love' slogan.
audience_proxy: Nostalgic Peanuts fans and collectors looking for 75th-anniversary commemorative items.
